items.markdown:
![Predictive Maintenance in Industry 4.0 | Nortech](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:14)
Predictive maintenance (PdM) `uses real-time IoT sensors and data analytics to continuously monitor equipment health` . By identifying anomalies and wear-and-tear early, it forecasts exactly when a machine is likely to fail, allowing maintenance to be performed just in time to prevent costly breakdowns.[](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance) [[1]](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance)[[2]](https://www.sap.com/products/scm/apm/what-is-predictive-maintenance.html)[[3]](https://matterport.com/blog/predictive-maintenance)[[4]](https://www.ifs.com/en/glossary/predictive-maintenance)

For a clear visual breakdown of how predictive maintenance compares to preventive and reactive strategies:![Related video thumbnail](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:15)
2m[Predictive Maintenance Explained![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:16)
![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:17)
RealPars YouTube · 04 Jul 2022](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2_o1SDy6__U) 

The Predictive Maintenance Process

A robust PdM program shifts facility and asset management from reacting to breakdowns or following rigid preventive schedules to a fully data-driven model.[](https://www.ifs.com/en/glossary/predictive-maintenance) [[1]](https://www.ifs.com/en/glossary/predictive-maintenance)[[2]](https://www.manwinwin.com/predictive-maintenance/)

- **Condition Monitoring:** Sensors continuously track physical indicators like temperature, pressure, acoustics, and vibrations.
- **Data Analysis:** Advanced algorithms and AI analyze this streaming data against historical baselines.
- **Anomaly Detection:** The system flags deviations from normal operations and calculates the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of components.
- **Actionable Intervention:** Maintenance teams are alerted to service the equipment *only* when necessary, eliminating wasted part life and unexpected outages.[](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance) [[1]](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance)[[2]](https://www.ifs.com/en/glossary/predictive-maintenance)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5ChEy3lIqMQ&t=69)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2_o1SDy6__U&t=154)[[5]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=InMlOMcUzM4&t=727)

Core Benefits Moving to a predictive model delivers several major operational advantages:[](https://www.sap.com/ukraine/resources/what-is-predictive-maintenance) [[1]](https://www.sap.com/ukraine/resources/what-is-predictive-maintenance)

- **Eliminates Unplanned Downtime:** Prevents catastrophic machine failures that halt production and lead to cascading repairs.
- **Lowers Costs:** Reduces unnecessary routine servicing and prevents reactive rush-order fees for replacement parts.
- **Maximizes Asset Lifespan:** Extends the working life of heavy machinery by treating it strictly according to its real-time condition.
- **Improves Safety:** Lowers the risk of workplace accidents by mitigating equipment failure hazards.[](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance) [[1]](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/predictive-maintenance)[[2]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Predictive_maintenance)[[3]](https://www.sap.com/products/scm/apm/what-is-predictive-maintenance.html)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2_o1SDy6__U&t=154)[[5]](https://www.sap.com/ukraine/resources/what-is-predictive-maintenance)

For a deep dive into the technology and specific use-cases that leverage deep learning and historical data:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn1.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSvGU0OTdA9KkLdxRZutayMHeb9VrgVqGa33VtBRPGocnpq2usB)
3m[Predictive Maintenance Using Deep Learning![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:18)
![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/06041616-1876-0139-0000-b9f8022a6658:19)
MATLAB YouTube · 12 Dec 2023](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=InMlOMcUzM4)
